postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley: Frantic first-half fightback ruins Glasner's century
postReview.description: Crystal Palace were absolutely rocked by a fine Burnley comeback in a five-goal Selhurst Park thriller on Wednesday.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley: Una remontada frenética en la primera parte arruina el centenario de Glasner
postReview.description: El Crystal Palace sufrió una gran remontada del Burnley en un trepidante partido de cinco goles en Selhurst Park el miércoles.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley: rimonta furiosa nel primo tempo, rovinata la partita numero 100 di Glasner
postReview.description: Il Crystal Palace si è fatto rimontare dal Burnley nel pirotecnico 3-2 di mercoledì a Selhurst Park.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley: virada frenética no primeiro tempo estraga o centésimo jogo de Glasner
postReview.description: O Crystal Palace foi sacudido por uma grande reação do Burnley em um jogaço de cinco gols em Selhurst Park, nesta quarta-feira.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley : une remontée folle en première période gâche le match du centenaire de Glasner
postReview.description: Crystal Palace a été sonné par l'incroyable remontée de Burnley, dans un match fou à cinq buts à Selhurst Park, mercredi.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley: Hektische Aufholjagd vor der Pause verdirbt Glasners Jubiläumsspiel
postReview.description: Crystal Palace wurde am Mittwoch in einem Fünf-Tore-Spektakel im Selhurst Park von Burnleys starker Aufholjagd komplett durchgeschüttelt.

postReview.title: كريستال بالاس 2-3 بيرنلي: عودة مجنونة في الشوط الأول تفسد مئوية غلاسنر
postReview.description: تلقى كريستال بالاس صدمة أمام عودة رائعة من بيرنلي في أمسية مثيرة شهدت خمسة أهداف على ملعب سيلهرست بارك الأربعاء.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 2-3 Burnley: reviravolta frenética na primeira parte estraga o jogo 100 de Glasner
postReview.description: O Crystal Palace sofreu uma grande reviravolta do Burnley, num jogo de cinco golos e cheio de emoção em Selhurst Park, esta quarta-feira.

preReview.title: Glasner '100% convinced' Mateta will give his best upon Palace return
preReview.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta will not be sidelined for as long as originally expected, though he will miss Crystal Palace's match against Burnley.

preReview.title: Glasner, "100% convencido" de que Mateta lo dará todo cuando vuelva al Palace
preReview.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta no estará de baja tanto tiempo como se esperaba, aunque se perderá el partido del Crystal Palace contra el Burnley.

preReview.title: Glasner está '100% convencido' de que Mateta dará o máximo na volta ao Palace
preReview.description: Mateta não deve ficar fora por tanto tempo quanto se imaginava, mas desfalca o Crystal Palace contra o Burnley.

preReview.title: Glasner: "Convinto al 100%" che Mateta darà il massimo al rientro nel Palace
preReview.description: Mateta starà fuori meno del previsto, ma salterà Crystal Palace-Burnley.

preReview.title: Glasner « 100 % convaincu » que Mateta donnera tout à son retour à Palace
preReview.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta sera absent moins longtemps que prévu, mais manquera le match de Crystal Palace contre Burnley.

preReview.title: غلاسنر «واثق 100%» بأن ماتيتا سيقدم أفضل ما لديه عند عودته إلى بالاس
preReview.description: لن يبتعد جان-فيليب ماتيتا عن الملاعب للمدة التي كان يُعتقد في البداية، لكنه سيغيب عن مباراة كريستال بالاس أمام بيرنلي.

preReview.title: Glasner zu 100 Prozent überzeugt: Mateta wird bei seiner Palace-Rückkehr alles geben
preReview.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta wird nicht so lange ausfallen wie zunächst befürchtet, Crystal Palace aber gegen Burnley fehlen.

preReview.title: Glasner '100% convicto' de que Mateta vai dar o máximo no regresso ao Palace
preReview.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta não deverá ficar parado tanto tempo como se esperava inicialmente, mas vai falhar o jogo do Crystal Palace frente ao Burnley.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
